subject: Fermi GBM trigger 485205628 /160517806 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 485205628/160517806
at 19:20:24.46 UT on 17 May 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity."
